name: project
description: Per-project atlas + map + Kanban board with hierarchical tasks, workstream-tagged cards, and All-Projects hub. v1.4.0 MINOR (v0.31.0 S6.5): hub note filename now defaults to the user-typed project name (e.g. 'Testing It All Out.md' under spice/projects/testing-it-all-out/) for native Obsidian tab title display. Configurable HUB_NOTE_FILENAME_STYLE constant in project-nav-buttons.js (name|slug|fixed). Rule_fragment refactored to type-discrimination via frontmatter_branch so audit + hub-cards filters are filename-independent. v1.4.1 PATCH CF-1: projects-hub-cards.js filter restored to match EITHER type:project OR legacy #project tag (older hub notes without type:project frontmatter were excluded from the Projects.md card grid); defensive type:map/kanban exclusions handle dataview's nested-tag expansion (#project/<slug> would otherwise falsely include Project Map + Project Board). v1.5.0 MINOR (v0.33.0 cohesion wave 2): adopts claude_surface[] — ships canonical /project slash command + new-project SKILL.md + resolvers row. Stale consumer-side .claude/commands/project.md bodies overwritten on next install. v1.6.0 MINOR (v0.39.0): NEW frontmatter fields status (7-state enum, required) + status_changed_at (YYYY-MM-DD, required) + teams[] + products[] (both optional wikilink lists). Default-active hub scope hides terminal statuses (superseded/cancelled/done). Tier 1 action buttons (Bump Status / Set Teams / Set Products) ship via ProjectActionButtons customjs class (S7). v1.7.0 MINOR (v0.46.0 S6): New Project create flow extracted to entity-create@0.1.0 mechanism — ProjectNavButtons._promptForProjectName / _createProject / _renderProjectsHub deleted (~184 LOC stripped), the class retains task-note + workstream + nav-row rendering only. Manifest declares new_entity_buttons[] with id=project, exercising three schema extensions for the first time: prompts[].derive (slugify(prompts.name)), extra_files[] for the Project Map + <slug>-board sidecars, and frontmatter_template with literal defaults (status:idea, status_changed_at:{{now.YYYY-MM-DD}}, workstreams:[]). content/Projects.md swaps the inline ProjectNavButtons-dispatched dataviewjs block for an <!-- entity-create:project --> marker. v1.7.2 PATCH (v0.47.0): no on-disk manifest changes; PATCH bump captures the fact that the installer's resolveEntityCreateEntry now auto-prepends {{templates_path}}/ on bare body_template basenames, changing this blueprint's registry output. Fixes BUG-3/4 from headspace Phase 3 (project atlas + Map + Board bodies were empty because the runtime _readBody resolved bare basenames against vault root). v1.8.0 MINOR (v0.48.0): NEW ProjectTaskCreateListener customjs class subscribes once at vault load (via NEW Templater startup template Project Task Create Listener.md) to vault.create for files matching ^spice/projects/<slug>/tasks/<file>.md$ and invokes Templater's replace-in-file-templater command on them. Fixes BUG-5 (kanban "+ Add a card" doesn't run Templater post-paste). NEW manifest field templater_startup_templates[]. Template, Kanban Card.md enhanced with "+ Create new workstream" sentinel + empty-workstreams Notice. v1.9.0 MINOR (v0.49.0 S1): NEW ProjectTaskCreateListenerInit customjs class registered in customjs plugin's startupScriptNames[] via NEW manifest field customjs_startup_scripts[]. Replaces v0.48.0's Templater startup_template registration mechanism (which failed silently at consumer vaults). v0.48.0's Templater wiring stays as belt-and-suspenders backstop (idempotent init via _initialized flag). v1.9.1 PATCH (v0.49.1): Template, Kanban Card.md source-board detection + auto-promote fix. Previously detectPath = targetPath || activePath produced vault-root path when kanban-plugin invokes Templater's create-new-note-from-template (Templater controls folder placement, defaulting to vault root). The new logic prefers tp.config.active_file (the source board the user clicked + Add a card on), so the workstream picker and auto-promote tp.file.move both fire correctly regardless of where Templater initially placed the file. Surfaced 2026-05-16: user reported new card files landing at vault root with no workstream prompt; root cause was that the kanban-plugin's per-board new-note-folder setting is ignored when new-note-template is set (kanban delegates folder placement to Templater).

post_install.message: Project blueprint v1.0.0 installed at spice/projects/. To create your first project: open spice/projects/Projects.md (Cmd+O → search 'Projects') and click the 'New Project' action button. Per-project Kanban cards auto-promote to folder-style (tasks/<X>/<X>.md and board/<Y>/<Y>.md) via Templater. Workstream tagging on cards via the Change/Assign widget rendered on each card. Cmd+R required after this install to load the 3 CustomJS classes.

bootstrap_contributions.prompt: Filter expression for this engagement's primary kanban (blank = no filter)
